name: Godiva White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the espresso in water and set aside.
2. In a food processor or mixer, combine the cream cheese, mascarpone cheese, sugar, Godiva liqueur, and dissolved espresso until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the melted white chocolate and pour the mixture into a 9-inch springform pan.
5. Wrap plastic film around the bottom and sides of the pan.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
7. Place the pan with the cheesecake batter in a water bath and bake for 45 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 1 hour.
9. Remove from the oven and refrigerate until ready to serve.
10. Garnish with fresh raspberries and mint leaves before serving.
